title: Auto Jump
text: Auto Jump Specify whether the cursor automatically jumps to the next field in the prompt sequence when the maximum field length is reached. The default is False . Value Description True Sets the JMP field syntax code. The next field in the prompt sequence automatically gets focus when the maximum number of characters has been reached. False The current field retains focus. Description Auto jump is affected by the maximum field length, which is counted in characters, not bytes. If incorrect data is entered in the field, the cursor remains in the field until the data is correct, even if Auto Jump is True . Applies To Modeled Field Syntax for Edit Box and Unifield widgets Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
